enable_ai_recommendations.description: Enable AI-powered personalized recommendations on home screen

enable_recitation_coach.description: Enable on-device recitation coaching with speech recognition

enable_focus_mode.description: Enable focus mode that blocks distracting apps during worship

enable_community_leaderboard.description: Enable anonymous community leaderboard (spiritual level rankings)

enable_streak_celebrations.description: Show celebration animations when prayer streaks are achieved

enable_night_mode_auto.description: Automatically switch to dark mode during Isha time

ai_max_recommendations.description: Maximum number of AI recommendations shown at once

prayer_reminder_minutes_before.description: Minutes before prayer time to send reminder notification

prayer_reminder_enabled.description: Enable scheduled prayer time push notifications

weekly_report_enabled.description: Enable weekly worship summary report via push notification

default_tasbih_target.description: Default tasbih count target for new users

show_onboarding_tips.description: Show onboarding tooltips for first-time users

islamic_api_timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for Islamic API calls

quran_audio_quality.description: Audio quality for Quran recitation streaming: low, medium, high
